ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the protein */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the protein record */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein record was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the protein record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the proteins table */,
  "file" TEXT /* Base file name for the protein */,
  "model" INTEGER /* Model number */,
  "recycle" TEXT /* Recycle step or iteration used in the modeling process */,
  "tol" REAL /* Tolerance value used in the modeling process */,
  "pLDDT" REAL /* Predicted Local Distance Difference Test (pLDDT) score */,
  "pTM" REAL /* Predicted Template Model (pTM) score */,
  "piTM" REAL /* Predicted Interface Template Model (piTM) score */,
  "iScore" REAL /* iScore value */,
  "iRes" INTEGER /* Number of interface residues */,
  "iCnt" INTEGER /* Number of interface contacts */,
  "file_model" TEXT /* Full file name for the model */,
  "num_clusters" INTEGER /* Number of clusters in the model */,
  "n_monomers" INTEGER /* Number of monomers in the model */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the protein file */,
  "file_recycle" TEXT /* Full file name for the recycle step */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the model based on overall quality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "computational_method" TEXT /* Computational method used for the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
